results.title: Saira Banu Remembers Dilip Kumar On Fifth Death Anniversary: He Was Steadfast Anchor Of My Life
results.description: Veteran Bollywood actress Saira Banu today, July 7, paid tribute to her late husband, actor Dilip Kumar. The actress shared a series of pictures with an emotional caption remembering him. Read below now!

results.title: ‘Kya aap the wahan par?’: Bhagyashree fires back at trolls for calling her lassi promotion video fake
results.description: Bhagyashree shared another video of herself enjoying kulhad lassi and addressed trolls saying that earlier she did a fake promotional video in Kashi.
